So I need to talk to my husband. Well, does your husband, you know, is your husband like, does he approve your current situation? What I mean by that is like, is he happy with like how you feel? Like, you've already expressed to him, he knows that you're not happy with your weight and how you look and how you feel, right? He knows that, right? So he doesn't approve of how you feel, right? He wants you to feel better, doesn't he? Right, well, then wouldn't it reason that if he wants you to feel good and healthy, that he would approve of you taking action to fix that, right? And so that's one that you can use to overcome as well. It's like, listen, he doesn't approve of your current situation. So like, he would truly approve of something to fix the current situation.
